vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Base rotary joint, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409
Mounting flange ISO 9409 compliant
Cable entry grommet for harness routing
Service access window for maintenance
Base plate with mounting holes
Drive shaft hole for harmonic drive
Heat shielded for welding cell deployment

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to heat shield effectiveness around cable entry.
risk.mit: Implement additional cooling mechanisms near the cable entry grommet.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment due to harmonic drive fit and clearance.
risk.mit: Conduct pre-assembly checks and ensure precise fit during assembly.

risk.desc: Potential strain on harness due to unsupported cable routing.
risk.mit: Ensure all cables have strain relief geometry and follow minimum bend radius guidelines.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to inadequate mounting hole pattern.
risk.mit: Review and reinforce the mounting hole pattern to ensure structural integrity.

risk.desc: Potential accessibility issues due to service access window design.
risk.mit: Optimize the service access window for better visibility and accessibility.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Base rotary joint, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

physics_paths.path: Base plate -> Mounting holes -> Chassis -> Base Joint J1
Base Joint J1 -> Harmonic drive -> Arm links
Heat shield -> Cable entry grommet -> Base plate
Connector mate -> Harness passthrough -> Base plate

integration_opportunities.opportunity: Base plate can be integrated with mounting holes and cable entry grommet to simplify assembly
Drive shaft hole can be press fit into harmonic drive for secure connection
Service access window can be used for easy maintenance and inspection

verification_focus.focus: Mounting holes and base plate strength under 100Nm torque
Heat shield effectiveness around cable entry
Service access window visibility and accessibility

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to high heat generation from harmonic drive.
risk.mit: Implement active cooling system and monitor thermal zones during operation.

risk.desc: Cable routing through center bore may cause interference with harmonic drive.
risk.mit: Ensure clearance between cable and harmonic drive components.

risk.desc: Service access panel may not provide sufficient access for maintenance.
risk.mit: Review and adjust service access design to ensure adequate access.

risk.desc: Fastener pattern may not be optimized for assembly and disassembly.
risk.mit: Refine fastener pattern to improve assembly/disassembly process.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance between moving parts may lead to wear and tear.
risk.mit: Increase clearance between moving parts to reduce wear.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Shoulder Pitch Joint, Harmonic Drive, Cable Routing

physics_paths.description: Torque and moment from payload is transferred through the shoulder joint to the arm base.
Rotational motion is transmitted from the harmonic drive to the wrist module.
Heat generated by the harmonic drive is dissipated through a cooling channel.
Electrical power and signals are routed through the shoulder joint.
Access for maintenance and inspection of the harmonic drive.

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: CMM for dimensional accuracy, NDT for material integrity

risk.desc: Risk of cable harness damage during joint movement if not properly routed and secured.

risk.mit: Use temperature-resistant fasteners and consider thermal management strategies.

risk.desc: Thermal management of the harmonic drive enclosure may be insufficient.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the thermal inspection window or add additional cooling fins.

risk.desc: The power and signal channels may not be adequately separated.
risk.mit: Ensure that power and signal lines are routed in separate channels or are spaced at right angles.

risk.desc: The grounding scheme may not be clearly defined.
risk.mit: Specify the grounding scheme for each electronics module and ensure signal returns route alongside their signals.

risk.desc: The driver boards may not have sufficient clearance from walls and moving parts.
risk.mit: Ensure PCBs mount on standoffs with keep-out clearance to walls and moving parts.

risk.desc: The assembly sequence may not be clearly defined.
risk.mit: Include an ordered assembly_sequence with tool, torque, and datum per step.
